title: tephroseris integrifolia subsp. aucheri
intro: Tephroseris integrifolia subsp. aucheri, also known as Aucher's rock cineraria, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Turkey and Iran. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Tephroseris integrifolia subsp. aucheri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Tephroseris integrifolia subsp. aucheri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
